About.Name: Noi Brown
About.AboutText:
Hi, I am Noi Brown. I am a passionate computer Engineering student with a keen interest in software development and programming. Currently, I am pursuing my undergraduate degree at Seattle Pacific University. I am dedicated to expanding my knowledge and skills in various areas of computer Engineering, with a particular focus on C++ programming.

I enjoy tackling challenging programming projects and I thrive in collaborative environments where I can contribute my expertise and learn from my peers.

Beyond the classroom, I am curently working for Boeing company as an Electrical Engineer for Defense, Space and Security program.

Experience.ExperienceText:
I graduated in Electrical Engineering in 2018 and am currently working as an Electrical Engineer at Boeing in the Defense, Space & Security program. I am returning to Seattle Pacific University to pursue a degree in Computer Engineering.

I have excellent problem solving, handling conflict resolutions, and analytical skills, along with strong self-motivation and a solid work ethic.
Experience.EducationText: I have a B.S in Electrical Engineering and am currently pursuing a second B.S in Computer Engineering.
Experience.EmploymentText: I am currently supporting two programs within the Defense, Space & Security division.
Experience.SkillsText: I can work on multiple tasks simultaneously while coordinating with internal and external teams.

Project1.Title: Interesting Project 1
Project1.Desc:
I research parts, materials, and processes for all electrical equipment and also review drawings for the entire aircraft.

It has a GitHub repo and more details shown in screenshots.

Project2.Title: Interesting Project 2
Project2.Desc:
I review parts that are active, end-of-life, transferred, or discontinued, and report them in bill of materials systems.

It also has a GitHub repo and more details shown in screenshots.

Project3.Title: Interesting Project 3
Project3.Desc:
I design medium-voltage electrical systems, including substations, dry docks, and cranes, for Navy bases.

It does not have a GitHub repo or any additional screenshots.

Project4.Title: Interesting Project 4
Project4.Desc:
I am an Electrical Resident Engineer for the Federal Aviation Administration, working across the United States.

It does not have a GitHub repo or any additional screenshots.

Project5.Title: Interesting Project 5
Project5.Desc:
I design commercial buildings and solar PV systems for schools and universities.

It does not have a GitHub repo or any additional screenshots.

Project6.Title: Interesting Project 6
Project6.Desc:
I provide design and construction administration services for the East Link and Lynnwood Link stations and garages for Sound Transit.

It does not have a GitHub repo or any additional screenshots.
